title: Retrieval Review: CSS Units and Bounded Fluid Sizing
summary: Retrieval Review: CSS Units and Bounded Fluid Sizing retrieves prior skills in an original changed output medium and viewport constraints scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css absolute units, css font relative units, css percentage units, css viewport dynamic units, css math fluid sizing in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real changed output medium and viewport constraints artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Community Needs Survey sizing work here. -->
starterFiles.css: /* Continue the bounded responsive sizing system here. */

options.text: Changed output medium and viewport constraints case 1: cSS pixels always correspond to one physical device pixel.
Changed output medium and viewport constraints case 1: choose px for suitable screen-relative details and physical units for controlled print constraints, then verify zoom and actual output.
Changed output medium and viewport constraints case 1: use centimeters for all screen text because physical measurements are always more consistent.
